page_metadata.biotools__summary: Estimates error model parameters from replicated, preprocessed experiments, and  uses error model to improve the accuracy of the expression ratio and to assign a value ‘lambda’ to each gene, indicating the likelihood that the gene is differentially expressed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Estimates error model parameters from replicated, preprocessed experiments, and  uses error model to improve the accuracy of the expression ratio and to assign a value ‘lambda’ to each gene, indicating the likelihood that the gene is differentially expressed.
